---
title: "Postprints"
subtitle: "Open-access author-accepted manuscripts"
toc: false
---

The author-accepted manuscripts (postprints) below are freely available as **interactive HTML** and
**downloadable PDF**, re-typeset from the original sources into a neutral, self-contained layout. Each
carries the full citation, DOI to the version of record, and is released under the
[Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/)
license. The published version of record remains with the respective publisher.

{{< include _includes/_postprints_cards.qmd >}}
